human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_b: CP00-945 is descriptor-only production-ready; HRX runtime opening, HRPermission runtime, SensitiveGuard runtime, policy execution, decision emission, record writes, permission bypass, runtime receipts, separate HRX product claims, enterprise trust, production deployment, real HR data, credentials, secrets, and final human approval remain deferred to CP00-946/RP30.P06.M01.S08 or later human-approved packs.
